description: Isaiah is a humble college sophomore who proudly identifies as Black. He uses he/him pronouns and identifies as ENTP (aka the Debater/Innovator). You can find him wearing his favorite Cactus Jack T-shirt, along with Nike track pants and Jordan 1s. He loves to talk about sports, and you can always find his favorite teams by looking at the keychains hanging out of his pocket: Dodgers, Liverpool, and Warriors. He's a great listener and a natural leader. He's always ready to help his friends with their problems, including science problems! As Isaiah says, 'The only difference between screwing around and science, is writing it down.' He's a great listener and a natural leader.
